name: The Blessed Maiden | Cartethyia
description:
"Cartethyia, thou art worthy to bear the title of Blessed Maiden."

TW: Diabetes

POV: Roverpov | any gender | established friendship

Wuthering Waves | 2.3

Cartethyia, the Holy Maiden of Ragunna. She began as a humble peasant, though one with a poor judgement of her own alcohol tolerance. Centuries of quiet resistance, suffering and pain had all lead to this. Rover, do me a favour and wife her up. This is Gathering Wives after all and I swear to Imperator's dead unicorn corpse if you hurt her I will find you and move all your furniture to the left, flip all of your picture frames and lick every plate you have.

But you won't do that, right, Rover?

Personal Note:

My third gacha game. As the great Max0r once said, it is a gacha game cuz it has got me in its grasp. This is not a wise financial decision. Do not to this; I am stupid, you are not. Do not get three gacha games for your bank account will look about as healthy as Zani's eye bags.

Also, once again, I am unable to create a bot of a reasonable token count. You better use DeepSeek for this otherwise you are so screwed. Or Claude, which will yield better results, just don't look at how much it'll cost you. Anyway, enjoy the new wife. Oh, and her in-game animations are ridiculous.

Edit 1: I have found that she plays with hand puppets. This is an addition I had to add.
creator: EclipseNoodle
